slices.name: _run
slices.code:
14 | def _run(args: list, cwd: str = _CWD) -> subprocess.CompletedProcess:
  15 |     return subprocess.run(
  16 |         [sys.executable, _LINTER] + args,
  17 |         cwd=cwd,
  18 |         capture_output=True,
  19 |         text=True,
  20 |     )

slices.name: _lint_cmd
slices.code:
23 | def _lint_cmd(command: str, extra_args: list = None, tmp: pathlib.Path = None) -> dict:
  24 |     """Lint an inline command and return the parsed JSON report."""
  25 |     with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
  26 |         out = pathlib.Path(td) / "report.json"
  27 |         base_args = ["--command", command, "--out", str(out)]
  28 |         if extra_args:
  29 |             base_args += extra_args
  30 |         result = _run(base_args)
  31 |         if out.exists():
  32 |             return json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  33 |         raise AssertionError(f"Linter did not write report.\nstdout: {result.stdout}\nstderr: {result.stderr}")

slices.name: TestCommandFileInput
slices.code:
190 | class TestCommandFileInput(unittest.TestCase):
 191 |     """--command-file reads a file; R007 fires for file-level missing doctor step."""
 192 | 
 193 |     def test_command_file_with_clean_commands(self):
 194 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 195 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 196 |             cmd_file = tmp / "cmds.ps1"
 197 |             cmd_file.write_text(
 198 |                 "python create_file_map_v3.py --roots . --out map.csv\n"
 199 |                 "python manifest_doctor.py --manifest map.csv --out report.json\n"
 200 |                 "python semantic_slicer_v6.0.py --manifest map.csv --deterministic\n",
 201 |                 encoding="utf-8",
 202 |             )
 203 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 204 |             result = _run(["--command-file", str(cmd_file), "--out", str(out)])
 205 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 206 |             self.assertEqual(data["command_source"], "cmds.ps1")
 207 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "PASS")
 208 | 
 209 |     def test_command_file_ps1_with_backtick_continuation(self):
 210 |         """PS1 backtick-continued lines are joined correctly."""
 211 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 212 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 213 |             cmd_file = tmp / "cmds.ps1"
 214 |             cmd_file.write_text(
 215 |                 "python semantic_slicer_v6.0.py `\n"
 216 |                 "    --manifest map.csv `\n"
 217 |                 "    --deterministic\n",
 218 |                 encoding="utf-8",
 219 |             )
 220 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 221 |             _run(["--command-file", str(cmd_file), "--out", str(out)])
 222 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 223 |             # No R004 (no positional '.'), no R003, should be PASS
 224 |             all_ids = (
 225 |                 [e["rule_id"] for e in data["errors"]] +
 226 |                 [w["rule_id"] for w in data["warnings"]]
 227 |             )
 228 |             self.assertNotIn("R004", all_ids)
 229 |             self.assertNotIn("R003", all_ids)
 230 | 
 231 |     def test_command_file_broad_slicer_without_doctor_warns_r007(self):
 232 |         """R007 fires when a command file has a broad slicer but no manifest_doctor step."""
 233 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 234 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 235 |             cmd_file = tmp / "no_doctor.ps1"
 236 |             cmd_file.write_text(
 237 |                 "python create_file_map_v3.py --roots . --out map.csv\n"
 238 |                 "python semantic_slicer_v6.0.py . --deterministic\n",
 239 |                 encoding="utf-8",
 240 |             )
 241 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 242 |             _run(["--command-file", str(cmd_file), "--out", str(out)])
 243 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 244 |             all_ids = (
 245 |                 [e["rule_id"] for e in data["errors"]] +
 246 |                 [w["rule_id"] for w in data["warnings"]]
 247 |             )
 248 |             self.assertIn("R007", all_ids)

slices.name: TestRewriteOut
slices.code:
251 | class TestRewriteOut(unittest.TestCase):
 252 |     """--rewrite-out writes suggestions without mutating the original."""
 253 | 
 254 |     def test_rewrite_out_written_and_original_unchanged(self):
 255 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 256 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 257 |             cmd_file = tmp / "commands.ps1"
 258 |             original_content = "python create_file_map_v2.py -o output.csv\n"
 259 |             cmd_file.write_text(original_content, encoding="utf-8")
 260 | 
 261 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 262 |             rewrite = tmp / "rewrites.txt"
 263 | 
 264 |             _run([
 265 |                 "--command-file", str(cmd_file),
 266 |                 "--out", str(out),
 267 |                 "--rewrite-out", str(rewrite),
 268 |             ])
 269 | 
 270 |             # Original must not be mutated
 271 |             self.assertEqual(cmd_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), original_content)
 272 | 
 273 |             # Rewrite file must exist and contain suggestions
 274 |             self.assertTrue(rewrite.exists(), "rewrite-out file was not created")
 275 |             content = rewrite.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 276 |             self.assertIn("R001", content)
 277 |             self.assertIn("--out", content)
 278 |             self.assertIn("no original command was modified", content.lower())
 279 | 
 280 |     def test_rewrite_out_with_no_issues_notes_no_suggestions(self):
 281 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 282 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 283 |             out = tmp / "report.json"

slices.name: test_rewrite_out_written_and_original_unchanged
slices.code:
254 |     def test_rewrite_out_written_and_original_unchanged(self):
 255 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 256 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 257 |             cmd_file = tmp / "commands.ps1"
 258 |             original_content = "python create_file_map_v2.py -o output.csv\n"
 259 |             cmd_file.write_text(original_content, encoding="utf-8")
 260 | 
 261 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 262 |             rewrite = tmp / "rewrites.txt"
 263 | 
 264 |             _run([
 265 |                 "--command-file", str(cmd_file),
 266 |                 "--out", str(out),
 267 |                 "--rewrite-out", str(rewrite),
 268 |             ])
 269 | 
 270 |             # Original must not be mutated
 271 |             self.assertEqual(cmd_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), original_content)
 272 | 
 273 |             # Rewrite file must exist and contain suggestions
 274 |             self.assertTrue(rewrite.exists(), "rewrite-out file was not created")
 275 |             content = rewrite.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 276 |             self.assertIn("R001", content)
 277 |             self.assertIn("--out", content)
 278 |             self.assertIn("no original command was modified", content.lower())

slices.name: TestLinterDoesNotExecute
slices.code:
298 | class TestLinterDoesNotExecute(unittest.TestCase):
 299 |     """Linter must not execute the command being linted."""
 300 | 
 301 |     def test_dangerous_command_is_not_executed(self):
 302 |         """A rm/del command embedded with a Python tool must not run."""
 303 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 304 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 305 |             canary = tmp / "canary.txt"
 306 |             canary.write_text("safe", encoding="utf-8")
 307 | 
 308 |             # Embed a command that would delete the canary if executed
 309 |             cmd = f"python create_file_map_v3.py --out out.csv; del {canary}"
 310 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 311 |             _run(["--command", cmd, "--out", str(out)])
 312 | 
 313 |             # Canary must still exist
 314 |             self.assertTrue(
 315 |                 canary.exists(),
 316 |                 "Linter must not execute the command under lint"
 317 |             )
